title: Spora Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for plugin.json — the manifest every Spora plugin must ship.

slug.description: Unique machine-readable identifier for this plugin. Used as the component key in schema_versions and as the required prefix for migration filenames. Must be stable across releases.

class.description: Fully-qualified class name of the plugin entry point. Must implement Spora\Plugins\PluginInterface.

description.description: Short human-readable description of the plugin, surfaced by the inventory UI.

icon.description: Icon for the plugin in the inventory UI. Either a bundled icon name (e.g. "puzzle", "brain", "bell") looked up in the frontend's shared map, or a raw SVG path string starting with a path command letter (M/L/H/V/C/S/Q/T/A/Z) rendered directly. Defaults to "puzzle" when omitted.

file.description: Relative path (from the plugin directory) to the PHP file that declares the entry-point class. Defaults to Plugin.php when omitted.

autoload.description: PSR-4 autoload mappings registered with the Composer classloader before the plugin is instantiated.

psr-4.description: Map of namespace prefix to relative path. Multiple entries are supported.

files.description: PHP files to require_once before the plugin is instantiated, relative to the plugin directory. Use ["vendor/autoload.php"] to load the plugin's own Composer dependency tree.
